name: janumicode
description: True spec driven development with automated spec assumptions elicitation, error correction, human-agent memories, integrated with Claude Code.

janumicode.tokenBudget.description: Token budget for context packs (per role invocation)

janumicode.databasePath.description: Custom path to SQLite database (leave empty for default workspace location)

janumicode.llm.executor.model.description: Model name for Executor role (e.g., claude-sonnet-4, gpt-4)

janumicode.llm.technicalExpert.provider.description: LLM provider for Technical Expert role

janumicode.llm.technicalExpert.model.description: Model name for Technical Expert role

janumicode.cli.roles.executor.description: CLI tool for Executor role (code generation, task execution)

janumicode.cli.roles.technicalExpert.description: CLI tool for Technical Expert role (analysis, architecture, intake)

janumicode.cli.roles.verifier.description: CLI tool for Verifier role (claim verification)

janumicode.cli.roles.historianInterprete.description: CLI tool for Historian-Interpreter role (historical analysis)

janumicode.cli.gemini.model.description: Model override for Gemini CLI (e.g., gemini-2.5-pro, gemini-2.5-flash). Leave empty for Gemini CLI default.

janumicode.cli.codex.model.description: Model override for Codex CLI (e.g., o3, gpt-4.1). Leave empty for Codex CLI default.

janumicode.reasoningReviewer.enabled.description: Enable automated reasoning review of agent outputs. The reviewer examines agent thinking for flawed assumptions, logical gaps, and reasoning risks.

janumicode.reasoningReviewer.provider.description: LLM provider for the Reasoning Reviewer

janumicode.reasoningReviewer.model.description: Model for the Reasoning Reviewer (needs strong analytical reasoning)

janumicode.reasoningReviewer.minSeverity.description: Only surface reasoning concerns at or above this severity level

janumicode.evaluator.provider.description: LLM provider for the Response Evaluator (classifies executor output quality before proceeding)

janumicode.evaluator.model.description: Model for the Response Evaluator (lightweight, fast model recommended)

janumicode.documentGenerator.provider.description: LLM provider for document generation (prose artifacts from dialogue state)

janumicode.logLevel.description: Log level for the JanumiCode output channel

janumicode.validation.parallelAgents.markdownDescription: Run Deep Validation Review hypothesizer agents in parallel. When `false` (default), the three agents (security, logic, best_practices) run sequentially to avoid saturating the CLI provider with concurrent calls. Enable only if your CLI provider supports concurrent invocations without rate-limiting.

janumicode.mcp.mobileSpecialist.enabled.description: Enable mobile specialist LLM routing for iOS/Android goals. When enabled, the Executor can delegate to a specialized mobile LLM via MCP.

janumicode.mcp.mobileSpecialist.serverPa.description: Absolute path to the mobile-specialist MCP server entry point (e.g., /path/to/mcp-servers/mobile-specialist/dist/index.js)

janumicode.mcp.mobileSpecialist.baseUrl.description: Base URL for the specialist LLM API (e.g., https://api.z.ai/api/coding/paas/v4)

janumicode.mcp.mobileSpecialist.apiKey.description: API key for the specialist LLM service

janumicode.mcp.mobileSpecialist.model.description: Model name for the specialist LLM (e.g., glm-4.6)

janumicode.providers.claude-code.capabil.markdownDescription: Override capability list for Claude Code provider. Leave empty to use defaults.

janumicode.providers.claude-code.costTie.description: Override cost tier for Claude Code provider

janumicode.providers.claude-code.strengt.description: Override strengths list for Claude Code provider

janumicode.providers.codex-cli.capabilit.markdownDescription: Override capability list for Codex CLI provider. Leave empty to use defaults.

janumicode.providers.codex-cli.costTier.description: Override cost tier for Codex CLI provider

janumicode.providers.codex-cli.strengths.description: Override strengths list for Codex CLI provider

janumicode.providers.gemini-cli.capabili.markdownDescription: Override capability list for Gemini CLI provider. Leave empty to use defaults.

janumicode.providers.gemini-cli.costTier.description: Override cost tier for Gemini CLI provider

janumicode.providers.gemini-cli.strength.description: Override strengths list for Gemini CLI provider

janumicode.embedding.enabled.description: Enable vector embeddings for semantic search across dialogue artifacts (requires Voyage API key or local voyage-embed CLI)

janumicode.embedding.provider.description: Embedding provider: 'voyage-api' (cloud, voyage-4-lite) or 'voyage-local' (local ONNX, voyage-4-nano)

janumicode.embedding.model.description: Embedding model name (API: 'voyage-4-lite', local: auto-detected from ONNX)

janumicode.embedding.dimensions.description: Embedding dimensions (Matryoshka — lower = faster, higher = more accurate)

janumicode.embedding.localCliPath.description: Path to the voyage-embed CLI for local ONNX inference (default: 'voyage-embed' on PATH)

janumicode.interpreter.textToSql.enabled.description: Enable text-to-SQL for answering questions (Tier 3). The LLM generates a SELECT query against the database schema to retrieve relevant data. When disabled, falls back to static context.

janumicode.interpreter.ftsSearch.enabled.description: Enable full-text search (FTS5) over governed stream history for answering questions about executor output, claims, and activity events

janumicode.interpreter.workspaceQuery.en.description: Enable CLI agent delegation for answering questions about workspace files and directories (requires a configured CLI provider like Claude Code)

janumicode.interpreter.workspaceQuery.pr.description: CLI provider for workspace queries ('auto' uses the first available provider)

janumicode.speech.enabled.description: Enable speech-to-text input via microphone. Requires SoX (rec command) to be installed.

janumicode.speech.backend.description: Speech-to-text backend: 'whisper-api' (OpenAI Whisper cloud) or 'whisper-local' (local whisper CLI)

janumicode.speech.model.description: Model for transcription. API: 'whisper-1'. Local: 'base.en', 'small.en', 'medium.en', etc.

janumicode.speech.language.description: ISO 639-1 language code for transcription (e.g. 'en', 'es', 'fr'). Leave empty for auto-detect.

janumicode.speech.soxRecPath.description: Path to the SoX 'rec' binary for audio recording. Usually 'rec' if SoX is on PATH.

janumicode.speech.localWhisperPath.description: Path to the local whisper CLI binary. Only used when backend is 'whisper-local'.

scripts.compile: pnpm run check-types && pnpm run lint && node esbuild.js
scripts.package: pnpm run check-types && pnpm run lint && node esbuild.js --production
scripts.pretest: pnpm run compile-tests && pnpm run compile && pnpm run lint
